description: Line chart of average SPG scores from 2019 to 2023 for three regions — Western, Piedmont Triad, and Northeast. The lines break over 2020–21, when no School Performance Grades were issued because of COVID; all three regions sit lower in 2022–23 than in 2019.

title.text: Average SPG score over time, selected regions
title.subtitle: No School Performance Grades were issued in 2020–21 (COVID). The line breaks at the gap — it is never connected through missing years.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
